grant_title: Ralph C. Wilson, Jr. Foundation Arts & Culture Initiative - General Operating Micro Grants
geographic_restrictions: Applicant organizations must be physically located and/or operate in one or more of nine counties: Allegany, Cattaraugus, Chautauqua, Erie, Genesee, Monroe, Niagara, Orleans, Wyoming (Western New York, including Monroe County).
project_area: Arts and culture organizations with core missions in arts and culture, including immediate programming execution.
demographic_requirements: None explicitly stated beyond geographic and organizational criteria.
eligibility_summary: Small to mid-sized 501(c)(3) nonprofit organizations (or fiscal sponsorships) with arts and culture as core missions, operating budgets ≤ $500,000, and located in/operating in the nine specified counties. Exceptions may apply for rural communities with limited arts organizations. Organizations undergoing significant capital projects are eligible but prioritized if fully active in programming. Excludes 13 named organizations receiving direct yearly funding.
